Westlake.name: Digital X-Ray System
Westlake.description: High-resolution digital X-ray imaging system with advanced diagnostic capabilities. Features instant image processing, minimal radiation exposure, and seamless integration with practice management software.

Westlake.name: Intraoral Camera
Westlake.description: Premium intraoral camera with HD imaging and LED illumination. Perfect for patient education and detailed diagnosis. Includes wireless connectivity and ergonomic design.

Westlake.name: Dental Microscope
Westlake.description: Professional-grade dental microscope with superior magnification and LED lighting. Ideal for endodontic procedures and detailed restorative work.

Westlake.name: Dental Unit Chair
Westlake.description: State-of-the-art dental chair with ergonomic design and multiple positioning options. Features integrated LED light, touch controls, and durable upholstery.

Westlake.name: Ultrasonic Scaler
Westlake.description: Professional ultrasonic scaler for efficient calculus removal. Features adjustable power settings, multiple tip options, and water flow control.

Westlake.name: Composite Curing Light
Westlake.description: High-intensity LED curing light with multiple curing modes. Provides fast and reliable polymerization with ergonomic wireless design.

Nanofill.name: Autoclave Sterilizer
Nanofill.description: Advanced autoclave sterilizer with rapid cycle times and large capacity. Features automatic door locking, digital display, and comprehensive safety systems.

Nanofill.name: Ultrasonic Cleaner
Nanofill.description: High-frequency ultrasonic cleaner for effective instrument cleaning. Features adjustable timer, temperature control, and stainless steel tank.

Nanofill.name: Surgical Instrument Set
Nanofill.description: Complete set of premium surgical instruments including forceps, elevators, and scalpels. Made from high-grade stainless steel for durability and precision.

Nanofill.name: Restorative Kit
Nanofill.description: Professional restorative instrument kit with excavators, carvers, and burnishers. Ergonomic handles for comfortable extended use.

MLG.name: MLG Handpiece
MLG.description: High-speed dental handpiece with precision engineering. Smooth operation and durability for daily practice.

MLG.name: MLG Suction System
MLG.description: Efficient suction system for dental procedures. Quiet operation and easy maintenance.

MLG.name: MLG Curing Lamp
MLG.description: LED curing lamp with multiple intensity settings. Ideal for composite and bonding procedures.

MLG.name: MLG Sterilization Tray
MLG.description: Stainless steel sterilization tray set. Compatible with standard autoclaves.

MLG.name: MLG Diagnostic Kit
MLG.description: Complete diagnostic kit with mirror, explorer, and probe. Ergonomic design for comfort.
